rawFiles.name: syria-coordination-meeting-minutes-9-july-2026.pdf
rawFiles.notes: Public Logistics Cluster PDF and HTML page, published and revised on 2026-07-14. Source was reviewed for data currency only; no source file is mirrored in this repository.

importedFields: Latakia Port to Adra cargo train note
Deir Ez-Zor UNHAS test flight note
transforms: Review the meeting minutes for stable, source-dated transport observations that fit the current status or route snapshot models.
Hold single-shipment rail notes because they do not establish a reusable public route or corridor snapshot.
Hold UNHAS test-flight and tentative rehabilitation timeline notes because they are future or operational claims rather than stable canonical transport reference data.
Do not add import-clearance guidance documents as location, route, or status records because they describe procedures, not canonical transport locations.
reviewNotes: Reviewed the 9 July 2026 Syria coordination meeting minutes during the 2026-07-14 freshness check. No canonical records were added or changed. The Latakia Port to Adra cargo train item was held as a single operational anecdote, and the Deir Ez-Zor UNHAS test-flight and tentative 20 August rehabilitation note were held as future/operational status claims. The related July 2026 import-clearance guidance documents were also reviewed at page level and held because they are procedural guidance rather than transport reference records.
